class.name: ResonanceDynamicGeometry
class.brief_description: Dynamic acoustic geometry for doors, moving platforms, and other animated objects.
class.description: ResonanceDynamicGeometry is a subclass of [ResonanceGeometry] for moving objects. It is excluded from the baked static scene export. The mesh is exported separately via Tools → Nexus Resonance → Export Dynamic Meshes or via the inspector "Export Mesh" button when a ResonanceDynamicGeometry is selected. Assign a [ResonanceGeometryAsset] to [member mesh_asset] when using export (auto-assigned by Export Dynamic Mesh). Enable path validation ([url=#ResonanceRuntimeConfig]ResonanceRuntimeConfig[/url] defaults or per-source **Enabled** in [url=#ResonancePlayerConfig]ResonancePlayerConfig[/url]) when dynamic geometry can block baked paths.
